notes: The finite Kuramoto order parameter r = |Mean[Exp[I theta]]| is bounded by 0 and 1.
For K >= |Delta omega|, a two-oscillator fixed phase delta = ArcSin[Delta omega/K] solves K Sin[delta] = Delta omega.
The Mercury-style 3:2 spin-orbit lock has exact reciprocal 2/3.
The harmonic ladder f_n = n f_1 gives f_2/f_1 = 2 and reciprocal 1/2.
The first radial cavity mode root satisfies J_0(root) = 0 numerically.
A negative-gradient entrainment law gives nonpositive Lyapunov derivative.
Beat activation windows t_n = n/(2 Delta f) are evenly spaced by 1/(2 Delta f).
The bridge ratio 32/27 has exact reciprocal 27/32.
